input:
He was well respected and everyone enjoyed his company. This time, the maid stopped him as he passed by her. She related to him what she saw Abū Jahl doing to his nephew, Muhammad, and told him that the Prophet did not return any insult. Ḥamzah was furious with Abū Jahl. He went straight to the mosque in search of him. When he saw him with his kinsfolk, he went up to him with his bow in his hand. As he stood over Abū Jahl’s head, he struck him with the bow with all his might, causing a long cut in his forehead.
Source: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 9: Misrepresentation

output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 9: Misrepresentation

characters.name: Ḥamzah ibn ʿAbd al-Muṭṭalib
characters.appearance: Late 30s, light brown skin, athletic build, strong facial features. Thick dark beard with slight reddish henna tint, neatly kept. Wearing a simple white thobe, off-white turban wrapped tightly around his head, brown leather sandals. Broad shoulders, confident posture.

characters.name: Abū Jahl ʿAmr ibn Ḥishām
characters.appearance: Late 40s, light brown skin, slender build, slightly taller than average. Thin dark beard with slight grey streaks, neatly kept. Wearing a simple white thobe, plain brown woolen cloak, white cloth wrapped as loose head covering. Worn leather sandals. Sharp features, slightly arrogant posture.

output.moral_lesson: Standing up for Islam and the Prophet requires courage and conviction.
output.narrative_text: Ḥamzah learned that Abū Jahl was bullying the Prophet and causing him harm. He went straight to the mosque to find Abū Jahl and when he did, he defended the Prophet with his bow.

compliance.notes: Scene shows Ḥamzah defending the Prophet, but the Prophet himself is not visible. Ḥamzah and Abū Jahl shown with full faces, no graphic violence.

output.image_prompt: Watercolor illustration. Interior of a 7th century Makkah mosque. A tall slender Arab man with light brown skin, thin dark beard, wearing a white thobe and brown cloak, looking angry and holding a bow. He stands over a seated man with light brown skin, thin dark beard, wearing a white thobe, who looks scared and has a cut on his forehead. Simple stone columns, beige walls. Medium shot, eye level. Warm beige palette. No modern objects.
